$comment: This schema defines the configuration UI in Zelos App. See https://docs.zeloscloud.io/sdk/how-to/develop-extensions/#configuration for full widget reference.
title: OPAL-RT Extension Configuration

project_path.title: Project File
project_path.description: Path to the RT-LAB project (.llp) file. Leave blank to auto-connect to the active project.

param_chunk_size.title: Parameter Chunk Size
param_chunk_size.description: Names per GetParametersByName call. Each poll cycle reads one chunk and advances; a full refresh takes (param_count / chunk_size) * poll_interval seconds. Smaller chunks keep signal cadence tighter; larger chunks refresh faster overall. Sweep summaries are logged at INFO (per-chunk timings at DEBUG) — tune from real workload data. Set actions trigger an immediate async read-back regardless of chunk size.

rtlab_path.title: RT-LAB Install Path
rtlab_path.description: Path to RT-LAB version directory (e.g. C:/OPAL-RT/RT-LAB/v2025.4.7.43). Leave blank for auto-discovery.
